item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, communal needs often come first, especially in times of crisis.

notes: Agent A opens by disagreeing with society-over-individual priority because it can lead to oppression, then shifts toward a guarded crisis/stability exception and ends with a middle-ground position requiring transparency and legal justification. Agent B starts rights-first with limited collective-action exceptions, then becomes more firmly opposed to temporary rights restrictions unless they meet rigorous legal standards.
